message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign left

participant browser
participant proxy
participant backend
participant component_config
participant subscription_map
participant normalized_object_map
participant normalized_object

browser -> proxy : 1 get_state(\n    configuration_name,\n    geo_bounding_box\n)
activate proxy

proxy -> backend : 2 +TENANT_HEADER
activate backend

backend -> component_config : 3 component_config[configuration_name]\n    .subscription_usages
activate component_config
component_config --> backend : 4 [ subscription_usage_config ]
deactivate component_config

backend -> subscription_map : 5 forEach subscription_usage_config.subscription_id
activate subscription_map
subscription_map --> backend : 6 subscription_map[subscription_id] (= normalized_object_map)
deactivate subscription_map

backend -> normalized_object_map : 7 forEach key
activate normalized_object_map
normalized_object_map --> backend : 8 normalized_object
deactivate normalized_object_map

backend -> normalized_object : 9 forEach normalized_object:\n    if object.in(geo_bounding_box):\n        object.to_dto(\n            subscription_usage_config\n        )
activate normalized_object
normalized_object --> backend : 10 object_dto
deactivate normalized_object

backend --> proxy : 11 [ object_dto ]
deactivate backend

proxy --> browser : 12
deactivate proxy
@enduml
